title: Arcone Reborn
description: A modpack designed for survival multiplayer, while focusing on performance, better world generation, and balanced gameplay enhancements while keeping the vanilla feel.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f8d0da500aab97cbbad01741a4f49ea55c0e35f_0.webp) ## **SK:** Arcone Reborn Modpack je modpack (wow) zameraný na survival multiplayer, ktorý kombinuje výkonové optimalizácie, nové biomy a štruktúry, a aj ine vylepšenia. Pôvodne bol vytvorený pre súkromný friends-only server, no môže byť použitý aj na iných serveroch, ktoré hľadajú optimalizovaný a vylepšený survival zážitok, ktorý má stále vibe vanilla minecraftu.


~~⚠️ **Pozor! Tento modpack zahrnuje 2 verzie modpacku v každom vydaní novej verzie: Normal (xx.xx.xx) a Distant Horizons + Shaders (DHxx.xx.xx)! Verzia DH je tu pre ludi, ktori chcu mat top-tier experience pri hrani Arcone servera.**~~ ~~- Ak nehodlas mat vyprážaný počítač, tak si stiahni verziu bez DH pred cislom verzie.~~ ### Už dostupné s Distant Horizons & Shaders pre všetky versie od 3.5.0 ## **EN:** Arcone Reborn Modpack is a modpack (wow) focused on featuring a mix of performance, world generation, structure improvements, and gameplay tweaks. Originally designed for a private friends-only server, it can also be adapted for others who seek an optimized, immersive, and feature-rich survival world that still has the vibe of vanilla minectaft.


~~⚠️ **Warning! This modpack includes two versions in each release: Normal (xx.xx.xx) and Distant Horizons + Shaders (DHxx.xx.xx). The DH version is included for people that want the top-tier experience when playing on the Arcone server.**~~ ~~- If you aren't planning on having a deepfried PC, please download the version without DH in front of the version number instead.~~ ### Now available with Distant Horizons & Shaders on all versions above 3.0.5 of this modpack
